text: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work
summary: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work
ai_summary: Elon Musk reports that Grok, xAI's AI assistant integrated into X, is successfully implementing automatic translation and cross-language post recommendations—a feature that expands content discoverability across X's global user base. This demonstrates progress on a key product capability that improves user engagement by breaking down language barriers, directly impacting X's utility as a platform and Grok's practical value proposition.
embed_html:
Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 29, 2026

text:
Delivering 119 satellites to orbit at once!

Falcon 9, which can carry ~20 tons to orbit (with a reusable booster & fairing), is a “heavy” class rocket by conventional standards. https://t.co/dIUQslrLyD
summary: Delivering 119 satellites to orbit at once! Falcon 9, which can carry ~20 tons to orbit (with a reusable booster & fairing), is a “heavy” class rocket by conventional standards.
ai_summary: Elon announces SpaceX's Falcon 9 successfully deployed 119 satellites to orbit in a single launch, demonstrating the rocket's significant payload capacity of ~20 tons with a reusable booster and fairing. This exemplifies SpaceX's engineering achievement in rocket reusability and efficiency—key competitive advantages for reducing launch costs and increasing deployment frequency, directly supporting Starlink's constellation expansion and commercial space operations.
embed_html:

text:
Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. 

Many of the parts in Teslas are made in Japan. Panasonic has been our biggest strategic supplier over the past 2 decades. https://t.co/XkwdUIPeKy
summary: Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. Many of the parts in Teslas are made in Japan. Panasonic has been our biggest strategic supplier over the past 2 decades.
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces Tesla's significant capital investment in Japan to expand service centers and Supercharger networks, while highlighting the strategic importance of long-term supplier relationships—specifically with Panasonic, which has been Tesla's primary battery and parts supplier for over two decades. This illustrates a key business lesson about supply chain resilience and the value of maintaining deep partnerships with specialized manufacturers in critical markets.

text: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket https://t.co/OK4xGVFSs6
summary: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces SpaceX's 34th successful launch and landing of the same Falcon 9 rocket, demonstrating the company's progress toward full rocket reusability. This milestone directly reflects SpaceX's core business strategy of reducing launch costs through vehicle reusability, a critical competitive advantage in the commercial spaceflight market and essential for the company's long-term profitability and ambitious goals like Starship development.
embed_html:
34th launch & landing of the same rocket https://t.co/OK4xGVFSs6

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 30, 2026

ai_summary: Elon Musk promotes Grok Imagine, xAI's image generation capability, by sharing a direct link for users to try the product. This represents a product launch/feature announcement for xAI's Grok AI assistant, demonstrating the company's expansion into multimodal AI capabilities beyond text generation and positioning Grok as a competitive alternative to other AI tools.
